title: Add Anti-Clickjacking Headers (X-Frame-Options / frame-ancestors)
description:
Security scan flagged missing anti-clickjacking headers. The response needs either a CSP `frame-ancestors` directive or `X-Frame-Options` header to prevent clickjacking attacks.

### Current State
A `FrameOptionsMiddleware` exists in the Laravel middleware stack, but the security scanner still flagged the issue. Waqar confirmed the header is being set in the middleware. May be a false positive or a Cloudflare-related header stripping issue.
acceptance_criteria: X-Frame-Options header is set to DENY or SAMEORIGIN on all responses
CSP frame-ancestors directive is configured as an additional safeguard
Security scanner no longer flags missing anti-clickjacking headers
middleware_changes: Verify and ensure FrameOptionsMiddleware is correctly setting X-Frame-Options header. Add CSP frame-ancestors directive.
implementation_notes: FrameOptionsMiddleware already exists in the middleware stack. Issue may be caused by Cloudflare stripping headers. Need to verify if Cloudflare is in use and whether it affects security headers.
comment_summary: Waqar confirmed the X-Frame-Options header is being set via Laravel middleware. Asked whether Cloudflare is in use, as it may be affecting header delivery to the scanner.
